# HelixAnvil

> Completely native IDE built from scratch — sovereign editor kernel for the portfolio.

North star: Own a from-scratch native IDE: document model, commands, and desktop shell under portfolio control — not a foreign editor skin.. Hard promise: Edit coordinates and the text kernel are HelixAnvil’s; engines attach at boundaries..

## Canonical docs

- [AGENTS](AGENTS.md): agent-rules
- [CLAUDE](CLAUDE.md): claude-shim
- [GEMINI](GEMINI.md): gemini-shim
- [constitution](constitution.md): immutable-principles
- [VISION](VISION.md): vision
- [BUILD_SPEC](BUILD_SPEC.md): implementation-contract
- [REVIEW](REVIEW.md): review-gates
- [NEXT_ACTION](NEXT_ACTION.md): continuation-pointer
- [DECISION_LOG](DECISION_LOG.md): decision-journal
- [PROJECT_STATE](PROJECT_STATE.json): machine-state
- [BUG_OPERATING_SYSTEM](docs/quality/BUG_OPERATING_SYSTEM.md): bug-os-doctrine
- [AGENT_CONTEXT](docs/context/AGENT_CONTEXT.md): generated-orientation

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): vendor-neutral agent instructions

- [Agent context](docs/context/AGENT_CONTEXT.md): compact orientation for coding agents
